title: stelis chlorina
intro: Stelis chlorina, also known as the green stelis orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical forests. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat various health issues due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis chlorina include its potential to lower blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Stelis chlorina typically involve drying and powdering the plant, which can then be consumed as a supplement or used in traditional medicine practices.
